title: Rudgea spicata
taxonomy: Rudgea spicata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This family is commonly known as the madder family or coffee family. Rudgea spicata is a member of the tribe Psychotrieae within the Rubiaceae family. The tribe Psychotrieae is a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in tropical regions. Rudgea spicata is native to tropical regions and is often found growing in shaded areas.
